channel.title: BaggageIQ Blog
channel.description: Long-form dispatches on airline baggage fees, fare-tier traps, packing strategy, and booking flights at the true lowest price.

item.title: Why the Cheapest Flight Isn't Actually the Cheapest
item.description: That ultra-low fare might cost you more once you add bags. Learn how hidden baggage fees inflate flight prices and how to compare flights by true total cost.

item.title: Airlines That Include Free Checked Bags in 2026
item.description: A complete list of airlines that still include free checked baggage in economy class in 2026 — grouped by region with weight limits and comparisons to budget carriers.

item.title: Budget Airline Baggage Fees Compared: Spirit vs Frontier vs Ryanair
item.description: Side-by-side comparison of Spirit Airlines, Frontier Airlines, and Ryanair baggage fees in 2026. Personal items, cabin bags, and checked bags — which budget airline is cheapest?

item.title: How to Avoid Surprise Baggage Fees When Booking Flights
item.description: Practical tips to avoid unexpected baggage fees — from checking policies before booking to using credit card perks and tools like BaggageIQ to compare flights by true total cost.
